# datahub_roles (Data Source)

**DataHub ✅ | DataHub Cloud ✅**

Returns the URNs of all built-in DataHub roles (`Admin`, `Editor`, `Reader`).

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "datahub_roles" "all" {}

output "role_urns" {
  value = data.datahub_roles.all.urns
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `urns` (List of String) List of DataHub role URNs (e.g. `["urn:li:dataHubRole:Admin", "urn:li:dataHubRole:Editor", "urn:li:dataHubRole:Reader"]`).
